# Creating a pipeline with Azure Data Factory

## Objective
I came across Azure Data Factory on a youtube video and wanted to try it out. It is a service that simply allows you to create a pipeline that moves data from one place to another. My objective today is to copy a csv file from one destination in storage to another, e.g. input -> output

## Example Scenario (Generated by Claude)
A regional retail company receives a daily sales export from their point-of-sale system as a CSV file, dropped into an Azure Blob Storage container each morning by an automated process. Their finance team needs that data copied into a separate, access-controlled storage container before it can be ingested by their reporting pipeline in Power BI.
Previously this was done manually — someone on the ops team would download and re-upload the file each morning. The company needed this automated, auditable, and decoupled from human intervention so it could run reliably at 7am before the finance team started their day.
